projects.title: Authify Backend
projects.description: Built with ExpressJS, MongoDB and JWT. A backend for authentication and authorization with role based access control.

projects.title: Template Registry Backend
projects.description: A Registry for integrating most common backend services into your project and UI Components. Also get custom AI generated componet

projects.title: BloodSphere

projects.title: Food Delivery App UI
